parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What temperature will the woman use to cook the cake?
questions.explanation: Người phụ nữ đề nghị 160°C vì 180°C quá nóng, và người đàn ông đồng ý.

questions.prompt: What did Clara hurt when she played tennis?
questions.explanation: Clara nói cô ấy đập chân (leg) bằng vợt tennis.

questions.prompt: Which photo did the man take?
questions.explanation: Người đàn ông nói 'Just the one of the flowers' (Chỉ bức ảnh hoa là của tôi).

questions.prompt: Which was the woman's favourite present?
questions.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói cái túi từ chị gái cô ấy có kích thước hoàn hảo, đúng thứ cô ấy muốn.

questions.prompt: What did Tom lose?
questions.explanation: Tom nói 'I can't find my mobile' (Tôi không tìm thấy điện thoại của mình).

parts.instruction:
You will hear a phone message about going to play a hockey match.

Name of other team: Tigers

questions.prompt: Day:
questions.explanation: Tom nói 'we're playing later in the week, on Friday'.

questions.prompt: Name of village:
questions.explanation: Tom đánh vần 'L-E-D-B-U-R-Y'.

questions.prompt: Travel to village by:
questions.explanation: Tom nói 'you will need a car' vì không có xe buýt.

questions.prompt: Take:
questions.explanation: Tom nói 'can you pick up some drinks for the match?'

questions.prompt: Time match begins:
questions.explanation: Tom nói 'start playing at eight forty-five'.

parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Why didn't Peter go to the restaurant with Sue?

options.label: He had to do some work.

questions.explanation: Peter nói 'I forgot I needed to finish some work' (Tôi quên rằng tôi cần hoàn thành một số công việc).

questions.prompt: How long has the restaurant been open?
questions.explanation: Sue nói 'it's been open for five years already'.

questions.prompt: What did Sue and her friends eat at the restaurant?
questions.explanation: Sue nói 'we all chose pizza, which was delicious'.

questions.prompt: What nationality is the chef at the restaurant?
questions.explanation: Sue nói 'he's from the USA' (Mỹ).

questions.prompt: What does Peter say about his plans to go to the restaurant?

options.label: It doesn't matter which day he goes.
He's afraid the restaurant will be too crowded.
He'd like Sue's advice about the dishes.

questions.explanation: Peter nói 'I need you to tell me the best things on the menu' (Tôi cần bạn nói cho tôi những món ngon nhất).

parts.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: You will hear a man and a woman talking about going shopping. What will they buy?
questions.explanation: Cả hai đều muốn đến hiệu sách: người đàn ông muốn mua sách, người phụ nữ muốn mua tạp chí tài chính.

questions.prompt: You will hear a woman leaving a message for a friend. Why is the woman phoning her friend?

options.label: To invite her for a meal

questions.explanation: Người phụ nữ gọi để thông báo xe bị hỏng, không thể đến gặp bạn và sẽ gặp lại lần khác.

questions.prompt: You will hear a man telling his sister about meeting someone yesterday. Who did he see in town?
questions.explanation: Người đàn ông nói 'the one who was in my class when I was a kid' (người học cùng lớp hồi nhỏ).

questions.prompt: You will hear two friends making plans for the day. Where do they decide to go?
questions.explanation: Người đàn ông gợi ý 'How about the seaside?' và người phụ nữ đồng ý.

questions.prompt: You will hear a city tour guide giving a talk. Why is the museum closed now?

options.label: A special guest is visiting it.

questions.explanation: Hướng dẫn viên nói 'an important visitor's arriving today – the Queen' và bà đang tham quan bảo tàng.

parts.instruction:
For each question, choose the correct answer.

You will hear Susan talking to a friend about the sports she does. Which sport does she do with each person now?

Options:
A: Golf
B: Volleyball
C: Fishing
D: Badminton
E: Skateboarding
F: Swimming
G: Football
H: Tennis

questions.prompt: Elias (cousin):
questions.explanation: Susan nói 'now we play volleyball together' với Elias.

questions.prompt: Daniel (neighbour):
questions.explanation: Susan nói 'Daniel hurt his arm ... so we go fishing together instead'.

questions.prompt: Amira (friend):
questions.explanation: Susan nói 'we've started going to the pool every week' với Amira.

questions.prompt: Kelly (friend):
questions.explanation: Susan nói 'we go skateboarding in the park together' với Kelly.

questions.prompt: Valerie (friend):
questions.explanation: Susan nói 'we're having lessons' và 'badminton rackets' với Valerie.
